data.description: Multichain JSON-RPC + enhanced APIs (NFTs, transfers, prices).
Claude 4.x family — Opus, Sonnet, Haiku. Best-in-class reasoning and long context.
B2B contact and company enrichment — people, emails, firmographics.
Cornell's e-print archive of 2.4M+ scientific papers (physics, math, CS, bio, econ, stat). Free public API, no key. Returns Atom XML — agents should parse with their XML tooling.
Premium speech-to-text with speaker diarization, summarization, sentiment, topic detection, and PII redaction. LeMUR LLM over transcripts.
Native Brazilian data for AI agents — CNPJ, CEP, FIPE, holidays, interest rates, banks. The only x402 gateway with first-class LatAm coverage.
Independent web search index. Not a Google scrape.
Enterprise-grade scraping infra with proxies + SERP.
Ultra-low-latency voice synthesis (Sonic).
Company + person enrichment from domain or email.
Command R+ chat, multilingual embeddings, and best-in-class rerank for RAG pipelines.
Crypto market data — prices, market caps, OHLC, historical, exchanges, NFT floors, derivatives. Free Demo tier: 30 req/min, 10k credits/month, 50+ endpoints.
Fast, accurate speech-to-text and real-time transcription.
High-quality machine translation across 30+ languages.
State-of-the-art text-to-speech and voice cloning.
Neural search built for AI agents — semantic web search.
LLM-ready web scraping — clean markdown from any URL.
Free FX rate API backed by the European Central Bank reference rates. No API key required. ~30 currencies, daily updates, full history back to 1999.
Ultra-fast inference for open-weight LLMs (Llama 3.3, Mixtral, Gemma). OpenAI-compatible API.
Hacker News full-text search, item lookup, and user profiles via Algolia. No API key. Covers the entire HN history with millisecond response times.
Find and verify professional email addresses from a domain.
IP → geolocation, ASN, company, carrier, abuse info.
Embeddings, reranking, reader, grounding — RAG toolkit.
Persistent long-term memory layer for AI agents — store, search, and forget user-specific facts that survive across sessions. Closes the 'goldfish memory' gap.
OCR and structured data extraction — invoices, receipts, IDs, custom docs.
European frontier LLMs — Mistral Large, Small, Codestral. Strong multilingual (PT/ES/FR/DE) and code generation.
Farcaster protocol API — read/write casts, user graph, channels.

Free weather forecast API — no API key required. Often more accurate than commercial alternatives because it blends national weather services (DWD, NOAA, MeteoFrance, etc.). Includes forecast, historical, marine, air quality, geocoding.
GPT-4, GPT-4o, embeddings, and more from OpenAI.
Current weather, forecasts, and historical data worldwide.
LLM-backed search with citations, sonar models.
Run any open-source model (Llama, FLUX, SDXL, Whisper, etc.) via one API.
Free world country data — population, capital, currencies, languages, flags, borders, area, timezones, calling codes. No API key. Open-source community-maintained.
Gen-3 video generation.
Real-time Google, Bing, YouTube and Amazon search results API.
Stable Diffusion / SDXL image generation and editing.
Search engine purpose-built for AI agents — returns LLM-ready context.
Run open-source models (Llama 4, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mixtral, etc.) at scale.
Best-in-class embeddings for retrieval, RAG, and semantic search.
Wikipedia's official REST API + Action API. No key required. Page summaries, search, full article content, related pages, in 300+ languages.
